I’m not against you stopping by to watch, or setting me up with someone to watch, or...well, watching in general. I’m also not against sharing someone with you, if that wasn’t already obvious. Anno pauses for a second and tilts her head as she considers. “Partly,” she answers. “When it’s just me, you don’t have to worry. You can come up to me whenever we’re alone - hell, when we’re not alone - and take me then and there.
